Every Stuvia studio comes fully equipped — from broadcast mics to cinema lighting — and a host who handles the setup so you can focus on the work.
Add exactly what you need — no bundles, no bundled extras you won't use. Every add-on can be selected at booking or on the day.

settings.sg_icon_description: A trained crew member handles lighting, equipment swaps, and on-set logistics so you stay in creative flow throughout your session.
Add a macro, tilt-shift, or wide-angle lens to your kit. Sony and Canon mounts available. Full selection accessible on request.
iMac Pro preloaded with Capture One and Lightroom for live tethered shooting and real-time client approval on set.
Secure locked storage unit for your equipment between sessions. Perfect for multi-day shoots without the daily breakdown hassle.
Velvet Black, Aged Canvas, Kraft Paper, or Linen. Each specialty roll is prepped and hung before your session starts.
We connect you with a vetted makeup artist from our trusted network. You pay them directly — no Stuvia markup, no middleman fees.

settings.editor: The questions we hear most often about plans, add-ons and cancellations. Need something custom? Just reach out.

items.item_title: What's included in the listed price?
How does half-day vs. full-day pricing work?
Do you offer discounts for multi-day projects?
Can I bring my own crew and equipment?

settings.editor: Every booking includes the room, that studio's core equipment, gigabit Wi-Fi, the coffee bar and an on-site host who handles setup and breakdown.
Half-day covers any 4 consecutive hours, full-day covers 8. Both are noticeably cheaper per hour than booking ad-hoc, and you can split your time between morning and afternoon.
Yes — Project pricing applies to two days or more and unlocks volume discounts on add-ons, priority booking and a dedicated point of contact.
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before your shoot (72h for Production). Inside that window we offer free rescheduling or a credit for a future booking.
Absolutely. You're welcome to bring your own crew, gear, props and stylists. Our host will help you load in and out.
